title: Dihl Heavy Duty 40 cm x 60 cm Hessian Burlap Jute Sacks Sandbags (Pack of 5) Vegetable Potatoes Storage Sack – Strong, Tearproof, Natural and Biodegradable
features: Pack of 5 Hessian Jute sacks by Dihl. Each sack is 40cm x 60cm and can hold 18 KGs
Natural jute hessian sacks are extremely versatile, really strong, breathable, reusable and biodegradable
Multi-functional; From storing vegetables and potatoes, creating sand bags, Christmas stockings, compostable waste, display bags, and much much more
description: Product Description Dihl products have always prioritised great value for our customers. We strive to build products with excellent functionality, sleek and modern design, and back this all up with nearly two decades of experience. Check out our full range of homewares, garden, DIY and packaging products. Dihl - Products for your Home and Garden Specialists in a wide range of Gadgets, Tools and Appliances for your home We are proud to offer an extensive variety of domestic appliances including; Automatic Sensor Bins and Kitchen Bins Kettles & Hot Water Dispensers Toastie Makers, Sandwich Presses and Panini Grills Air Fryers and Electric Steamers Electric Juicers, Food Processors and Blenders Toolboxes and Storage Containers Weed membrane, Rubble Sack and Hessian Sacks Natural and Non-Toxic Available in size 40 x 60 cm and 50 x 80 cm these natural jute hessian sacks are extremely versatile, really strong, breathable, reusable and non-toxic. From storing vegetables and potatoes, creating sand bags, Christmas stockings, compost waste, display bags, and much much more. Available in packs of 5, 10, 20 and 50. Hessian sacks offer a combination of natural breathability, robust durability, and cost-effectiveness, making them an ideal choice for packaging and transporting a wide range of goods while minimising environmental impact. 40 x 60 cm - 10 Pack 50 x 80 cm - 10 Pack 40 x 60 cm - 20 Pack 50 x 80 cm - 20 Pack 40 x 60 cm - 50 Pack 50 x 80 cm - 50 Pack Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews — 4.6 out of 5 stars 5 4.5 out of 5 stars 101 4.6 out of 5 stars 85 4.5 out of 5 stars 101 4.6 out of 5 stars 85 Price — no data — no data £27.99 £ 27 . 99 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 £57.99 £ 57 . 99 £64.95 £ 64 . 95 Size 40 x 60 cm 50 x 80 cm 40 x 60 cm 50 x 80 cm 40 x 60 cm 50 x 80 cm Number of Sacks 10 10 20 20 50 50
